title: satureja xalapensis
intro: Satureja xalapensis, also known as Xalapeno savory, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Satureja xalapensis include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and digestive issues.
